case_title: RYAN ALEXANDER VS. ARTUR ARIRES JR.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ALEXANDER, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT ARIRES JR., ARTUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED OCT-20-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARIRES JR., ARTUR
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARIRES JR., ARTUR $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,630.00 PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON DEC-10-2011 AND ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
